useCaseInteractions.overview: Communication contracts and interaction flows between Frontend, Backend, Flashing, Remote, and Hardware modules

primaryUseCases.name: Firmware Flashing Workflow
primaryUseCases.description: Complete firmware flashing process with validation and execution

steps.details: Memory address conflict detection, module compatibility checking

contract.storage: Serialized to JSON in file system

primaryUseCases.name: Hardware Probe Discovery & Connection
primaryUseCases.description: Discover local USB/JTAG/Serial debug probes and establish connection

steps.details: Windows USB enumeration, COM port scanning

contract.jniCall: native void connect(String probeId, ChipsetConfig config) throws NativeException

primaryUseCases.name: Remote Probe Discovery & Network Connection
primaryUseCases.description: Discover network-attached debug probes via TCP/UDP and establish connection

contract.method: TCP connection attempts to known ports

steps.display: Populate UI with hostname, IP, status

primaryUseCases.name: Hardware Command Execution
primaryUseCases.description: Send and execute CMM commands via connected hardware probe

contract.jniCall: native CommandResult sendCommand(String command) throws NativeException

steps.display: Show success/error status, data in output pane

primaryUseCases.name: Remote Flashing Operation
primaryUseCases.description: Execute firmware flashing via network-connected remote probe

steps.action: Selects modules in Remote Flashing UI

contract.compression: Optional gzip compression for network transmission

frontendToBackend.overview: REST-like contracts between Frontend UI and Backend Services

contracts.name: Flashing Execution Contract
contracts.operation: execute(modules, profile, outputPath, runTrace32, trace32Path, logCallback, progressCallback)

contracts.name: Remote Connection Contract
contracts.operation: connect(String probeId, String ipAddress, int port)

backendInternalContracts.overview: Internal communication contracts within backend services

contracts.name: Validator→FlashingService Contract
validationChecks: All modules fit within flash boundaries

interface.returns: AITT_OK on success, error code on failure

output.out_probes: Pointer to array of ProbeInfo_t structures

contracts.name: Chipset Driver Interface Contract

operations.purpose: Send CMM command to debug interface

operations.function: chipset_write_memory(uint64_t addr, const uint8_t *data, int len)

contracts.implementationRequirement: Each chipset (S32K148, MPC5777M) must implement all functions with protocol-specific details

networkProtocolContracts.overview: Network communication contracts for Remote module
